text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right. Thanks for the reminder, 
I'll have to adjust that in my reports.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, age is important in research, but more 
so still is keeping a daily record if the changes 
time causes to one's physical bod—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Are you saying… you've never 
had a birthday celebration?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Mm? I guess not… I get a gift sometimes, but 
I don't see the need for one in the first pla—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Alright, let's throw you a birthday party!! 
I'm gonna go gather everyone right now!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No, listen. I like it when the subjects of my 
research gather together, but it's hard to do 
any research if everyone's eyes are on me ——

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll also prepare lots of food and drinks. 
Oh, and I already have a present for you. 
I hope you're looking forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to make this the best 
birthday party you've ever had!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
…I've always wondered if your eagerness 
and inability to listen to others is something 
you inherited from your parents.
